account_locked: Account locked. Too many failed attempts.
reset_password_desc: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
reset_link_sent: If an account with that email exists, you'll receive a password reset link shortly.
password_change_required_desc: Your password was reset by an administrator. Please create a new password to continue.
password_min_length: Min 8 chars, 1 uppercase, 1 digit, 1 special char.
buildings_step_desc: Add the buildings you manage. You can add more later from the dashboard.
claim_unit_admin_desc: If you also own a unit in one of your buildings, select it here. You can skip and do this later.
claim_unit_owner_desc: Select your building and the unit you own. You can update this later from your profile.
add_building_first: Go back and add your building first, or skip.
ask_admin_register: Ask your building manager to register the building first.
no_units_available: No available units in this building.
no_units_of_type: No units of this type available.
done_admin_desc: Your buildings have been set up. Manage apartments, expenses, and payments from your dashboard.
done_owner_desc: Your account is ready. Head to the dashboard to view your expenses and payments.
